changes: The action Unleash will no longer cancel auto-attacks in PvE areas.

new_content.name: Palace of the Dead
new_content.description: Deep dungeon with additional floors added, featuring a new scoring system, ranking page, and challenges beyond floor 100.

new_content.name: What Lies Beneath
new_content.description: Side story quest required to access additional floors of the Palace of the Dead.

new_content.name: Deep dungeon scoring system
new_content.description: A system that assigns scores based on floor progress and enemies slain, with an associated ranking page on the Lodestone.
new_content.npc_location: Wood Wailer Expeditionary Captain at Quarrymill (X:25.2 Y:20.6)

new_content.name: The Feast (Season Three)
new_content.description: Competitive PvP season with updated matching algorithms and tier adjustments.

housing.name: Pumpkin Stew
housing.description: An All Saints' Wake culinary tradition, this rich, buttery soup is oft served in a hollowed-out pumpkin. ※Cannot be retrieved once placed. ※Can be used up to 10 times.

housing.name: Season Two Lone Wolf Trophy
housing.description: A trophy awarded to those who "left their mark" in Season Two of the Feast.

housing.name: Season Two Pack Wolf Trophy
housing.description: A trophy awarded to those who "left their mark" in Season Two of the Feast.
